 succeeded in 1945ms:
---
name: workstream-task-lifecycle
description: Create and maintain timestamped task documentation files in the workstream lifecycle folders (`workstream/000_epic`, `workstream/100_backlog`, `workstream/200_inprogress`, `workstream/300_complete`) and respect supporting queue states such as `blocker` lanes and `pending` subfolders inside active columns. Use when a user asks to document changes, track progress for a distinct task, or enforce file movement across backlog/in-progress/complete states.
---

# Workstream Task Lifecycle

Execute this workflow whenever a distinct task needs a documented trail.

## Folder Structure
```
workstream/
├── 000_epic/        ← High-level specs, PRDs, strategic documents
│                      Source material for task decomposition
│                      Items remain here permanently as reference
│
├── 100_backlog/     ← Atomic tasks decomposed from epics
│                      Ready to be picked up
│   ├── pending/     ← Parked backlog items temporarily removed from active processing
│                      Do not treat as active-ready work until explicitly restored
│   └── blocker/     ← Backlog-stage blocked or retry-parked items when the pipeline uses blocker lanes
│                      Treat as blocked state, not ready backlog
│
├── 200_inprogress/  ← Currently active work
│                      One task = one active worker
│   ├── pending/     ← Parked in-progress items moved out of the active lane
│   │                  Preserve lifecycle file and resume only when restored
│   └── blocker/     ← Execution failures or blocked retries parked by lane/agent
│                      Treat as blocked state, not as normal active execution
│
└── 300_complete/    ← Finished and verified tasks
                       Archived for reference
```

## Queue State Semantics

- `100_backlog` and `200_inprogress` are the active queue surfaces.
- `pending` subfolders inside those active states are parking areas, not normal ready queues.
- `100_backlog/blocker/<agent>` and `200_inprogress/blocker/<agent>` are blocked/retry parking areas.
- When a pipeline control feature parks work into `pending`, do not silently pull it back into active processing unless the controlling condition has been cleared.
- When documenting a task, keep the same lifecycle file; folder movement changes state, not identity.

## Required Naming
- **Backlog items**: `yyyymmdd_hhmmss_{Project}_{Descriptive_Title}.md`
  - **Important**: Once atomic tasks have been generated from a backlog item, its filename must be renamed to end with `_processed.md` (e.g. `..._Title_processed.md`) to prevent duplicate processing.
- **Task files**: `yyyymmdd_hhmmss_{project}_{unique_task}.md`
- Use lowercase with underscores for `{project}` and `{unique_task}`.
- Keep one file per distinct task.

## Folder Lifecycle
1. **Epic** (`000_epic`): High-level specs live here until ALL derived tasks are complete. Use `document-to-task-decomposition` skill to create tasks from epics. Upon successful task decomposition, the epic file MUST be renamed to end with `_processed.md`.
   - **Mandatory manifest rule**: Every decomposed epic MUST also produce a decomposition manifest at `ep_<output_slug>/decomposition_manifest.json` in the epic output folder that will later be used for reconciliation.
   - The manifest MUST record, at minimum: canonical epic slug, epic name, source epic path, decomposition timestamp, workstreams, and the original task list.
   - If an epic already has decomposed tasks but the manifest is missing, the manifest MUST be backfilled before the decomposition/reconciliation workflow can be considered complete.
   - If the output folder slug differs from the canonical epic slug, the manifest must still exist in the actual output folder being used by the deliverable (for example the existing `ep_*` folder the tasks point to).
2. **Backlog** (`100_backlog`): Create atomic task files here (decomposed from epics or new requests).
3. **Backlog Pending** (`100_backlog/pending`): If the pipeline intentionally deprioritizes or suspends a backlog task, move it under the matching `pending` path and treat it as parked, not ready.
4. **In Progress** (`200_inprogress`): Move file here when active work starts. For decomposed work, model lanes pull the next dependency-ready task from active `100_backlog`, not from `pending`.
5. **In Progress Pending** (`200_inprogress/pending`): If active work is temporarily moved out of the live lane, keep the same file under the corresponding pending path until it is restored.
6. **Blocked / Retry Parking** (`100_backlog/blocker/...` or `200_inprogress/blocker/...`): If the pipeline parks blocked or retry work into a blocker lane, treat this as blocked, not complete or ready.
7. Update the same file continuously while working.
8. **Complete** (`300_complete`): Move task file here when finished and verified.
9. **Epic Completion**: When ALL tasks derived from an epic are complete, update the epic with links to completed tasks, then move the epic to `300_complete`.
10. Start a new file for each new distinct task.

## Backlog Completion Rules
A backlog item can ONLY be moved to `300_complete` when:
1. ALL tasks derived from it exist in `300_complete`
2. The backlog document has been updated with a "Completed Tasks" section listing links to each completed task
3. Each completed task links back to the source backlog

### Backlog Completion Template
Add this section to the backlog before moving to complete:
```markdown
## Completed Tasks
| Task | Completed | File |
|------|-----------|------|
| Phase 0: Brand | 2026-02-25 | `300_complete/20260224_130100_breakout_phase0_brand_design_foundation.md` |
| Phase 1: Website | 2026-02-26 | `300_complete/20260224_130200_breakout_phase1_website_build.md` |
...

## Backlog Status
**COMPLETE** - All tasks finished and verified
**Completion Date**: 2026-02-28
```

## Required Content Template
- `Source`: Link to backlog item (if derived from backlog).
- `Task Type`: mandatory explicit task-type declaration.
  - Every qualifying task MUST include `Task Type: <value>`.
  - `Task Type` MUST always be written explicitly, even when the value is `standard`.
  - If execution behavior is driven by the richer `Task Attributes` model, `Task Type` still remains required as the human-readable top-level declaration.
  - Minimum allowed explicit value:
    - `standard`
- `Task Attributes`: execution-behavior fields that control how the task behaves in orchestration.
  - Design principle:
    - Task attributes are not labels.
    - They define execution behavior.
    - If a field does not change how the system behaves, it should not exist.
  - Standard/default behavior:
    - If none of the task-behavior booleans below are enabled, the task is treated as a `standard` task by default: an end-to-end task with a straightforward start and finish.
  - Attribute model:
    - `recurring_task: true|false`
    - `recurrence_type: scheduled | trigger_based | state_based`
    - `recurrence_rule: cron | interval | condition`
    - `looping_task: true|false`
    - `loop_until: condition_met | manual_stop | max_iterations`
    - `loop_interval: <optional>`
    - `splittable_task: true|false`
    - `split_output_type: list | files | records | tasks`
    - `split_outputs:`
    - `  - id: "<item_id>"`
    - `    payload: {}`
    - `split_routing:`
    - `  process: "<downstream_process_name>"`
    - `  mode: parallel | sequential`
    - `  target_board: "<optional>"`
    - `  target_stage: "<optional>"`
    - `split_spawn_task: true|false`
    - `spawn_template: "<task_template_name>"`
    - `split_failure_mode: independent | fail_fast | retry_failed_only`
    - `workflow_task: true|false`
    - `workflow_name: "<string>"`
    - `workflow_stage: backlog | todo | in_progress | review | complete | failed`
    - `depends_on: []`
    - `feeds_into: []`
  - A task may enable more than one attribute.
  - `recurring_task` means the task creates new executions over time from an external trigger.
  - `looping_task` means the task repeats inside the same execution cycle until a stop condition is met.
  - `splittable_task` means the task creates multiple outputs that become new independent work items or routed outputs.
  - `workflow_task` means the task participates in a named workflow with structured lifecycle movement and dependencies.
- `Task Summary`: scope and requested outcome.
- `Context`: source files/systems affected.
- `Destination Folder`: mandatory output location declaration.
  - Every qualifying task MUST declare `Destination Folder` explicitly.
  - If the task produces output files (code, data, reports, artifacts, etc.), specify the folder path where these outputs will be placed.
  - All task outputs (files, generated assets, exports, etc.) MUST be routed to a subfolder within the declared `Destination Folder`.
  - If the task produces no file outputs, the task MUST state `Destination Folder: None`.
  - Examples:
    - `Destination Folder: epics/ep_strategy_performance_view/` (outputs go to subfolders within this path)
    - `Destination Folder: exports/reports/` (generated reports placed here)
    - `Destination Folder: None` (task produces no file outputs)
- `Dependency`: mandatory prerequisite declaration.
  - Every qualifying task MUST declare dependency explicitly.
  - If there is no prerequisite, the task MUST state `Dependency: None`.
  - If there is a prerequisite, record the required upstream task or artifact explicitly.
- `Plan`: checklist of implementation steps with one explicit completion test per step.
  - Format requirement:
    - `- [ ] N. <step description>`
    - `  - Test: <exact command/manual check and expected pass condition>`
    - `  - Evidence: <output snippet, file diff, screenshot path, or log reference proving test pass>`
  - The plan checklist must be present for every task file (new and updated), unless the task is explicitly marked as archival/no-op.
  - Sequential rule: each checklist item must be completed, its `Test` must be executed, and evidence must be recorded before proceeding to the next checklist item.
  - Completion marking rule: after a step test passes and evidence is captured, mark both the step checkbox and its test line as checked.
- `Evidence`: mandatory normalized evidence inventory for the task.
  - Every qualifying task MUST include an `Evidence` section, even if the only valid value is `not_applicable`.
  - Every qualifying task MUST also include `Objective-Delivery-Coverage: <0-100>%` directly under the `Evidence` heading.
  - Every qualifying task MUST also include `Auto-Acceptance: true|false` directly under the `Evidence` heading. Default is `true` when a task is created unless there is a reason to force manual review.
  - Interpretation:
    - `100%` means the recorded evidence is claimed to prove the task objective is fully delivered.
    - Any value below `100%` means the evidence is partial, conditional, or still requires reviewer judgement.
    - `Auto-Acceptance: true` means a task may be auto-accepted when the system sees `Objective-Delivery-Coverage: 100%`.
    - `Auto-Acceptance: false` means the task always requires manual acceptance, even if coverage is `100%`.
  - Each evidence item must use this format:
    - `- Evidence-Type: <type>`
    - `  - Artifact: <path, URL, command output, screenshot path, or "not_applicable">`
    - `  - Objective-Proved: <what this evidence proves>`
    - `  - Status: planned|captured|not_applicable`
  - Allowed `Evidence-Type` values:
    - `demo`
    - `url`
    - `screenshot`
    - `test_output`
    - `log_output`
    - `file_output`
    - `diff`
    - `manual_verification`
    - `user_feedback`
    - `not_applicable`
  - For user-visible tasks, include at least one evidence item that points to the actual deliverable access path (`demo`, `url`, `screenshot`, or `manual_verification`).
  - For implementation/refactor/bugfix tasks, include at least one technical proof item (`test_output`, `log_output`, `file_output`, or `diff`).
  - When the deliverable is an API, webpage, URL-driven flow, or executable that depends on multiple launch/verification steps, you may deliver a single `.bat` wrapper as the review package if it reliably launches, opens, or verifies the required components from one entry point.
  - When using a `.bat` wrapper, record the batch file path as an evidence artifact (`demo`, `file_output`, or `manual_verification` as appropriate) and also state exactly what it launches or verifies.
  - A `.bat` wrapper is packaging/verification convenience, not a substitute for the underlying deliverable proof. The evidence must still make clear what API, URL, webpage, or executable the wrapper exposes.
- `Implementation Log`: chronological actions taken.
- `Changes Made`: exact files, functions, schema, and behavior updates.
- `Validation`: commands run and results.
- `Risks/Notes`: known caveats, exclusions, and assumptions.
- `Completion Status`: final state and timestamp.

## Execution Rules
- The document content MUST be updated to match the current status of the task at all times.
- Every qualifying task MUST explicitly declare `Task Type`.
- `Task Type` is mandatory at task creation time and may not be omitted, even when the intended value is `standard`.
- Every qualifying task MUST explicitly declare `Destination Folder`.
- `Destination Folder` is mandatory at task creation time; use `None` if the task produces no file outputs.
- When a task produces outputs, all generated files MUST be placed within the declared `Destination Folder` or its subfolders.
- Every qualifying task MUST declare the relevant task attributes that change execution behavior.
- If no execution-behavior attributes are required, the task is still treated as `standard`, but the task file MUST explicitly state `Task Type: standard`.
- A task MAY declare more than one execution-behavior attribute when multiple behaviors apply.
- If `splittable_task: true`, `split_outputs` AND `split_routing` MUST be defined.
- If `recurring_task: true`, `recurrence_rule` MUST be defined.
- If `looping_task: true`, `loop_until` MUST be defined.
- If `workflow_task: true`, `workflow_name` AND `workflow_stage` MUST be defined.
- If `recurring_task: true`, `recurrence_type` SHOULD also be recorded.
- If `splittable_task: true`, `split_output_type` SHOULD be recorded and `split_spawn_task`, `spawn_template`, and `split_failure_mode` SHOULD be recorded whenever used by the orchestration.
- If `workflow_task: true`, `depends_on` and `feeds_into` SHOULD be recorded whenever they are known.
- When work begins, mark relevant `Plan` checklist items as in progress/completed as evidence accumulates.
- If a task is parked under a `pending` subfolder, record why it was parked and what condition restores it.
- If a task is moved to a `blocker` lane, record the blocking condition, retry expectations, and any known recovery path.
- For any decomposed epic, verify that `ep_<output_slug>/decomposition_manifest.json` exists before treating reconciliation, delivery coverage, or epic progress reporting as authoritative.
- If the manifest is missing for an already-active epic, create a dedicated lifecycle task to backfill it from the canonical task set and record that backfill in the same task file.
- A task may be marked complete only when all required `Plan` checklist items are checked off, each step test is checked off, and pass evidence is present.
- A task may be marked complete only when its `Evidence` section contains the required evidence items and each required item is `captured` or explicitly `not_applicable`.
- A task may not claim full objective delivery unless `Objective-Delivery-Coverage` is present and set intentionally based on the captured evidence.
- Automatic acceptance is allowed only when `Objective-Delivery-Coverage` is `100%` and `Auto-Acceptance` is `true`.
- Execute plan steps strictly in order: do not start item `N+1` until item `N` is checked, its associated test is checked, and evidence of pass is documented (or explicitly approved exception).
- Every test must be explicitly checked off; un-checked tests are treated as not executed.
- Update the current in-progress file before responding with final completion.
- Record concrete paths and command outputs in summarized form.
- Do not create side docs; keep the full task narrative in the one lifecycle file.
- Preserve prior entries; append updates rather than rewriting history.
- If the task scope changes materially, close current file and create a new task file.

## Completion Verification Gate
- For any task that changes user-visible behavior (UI, UX flow, outputs, business logic the user can validate), do **not** mark `Completion Status` as complete until user verification is requested.
- Before final completion, explicitly ask the user to verify the change and provide pass/fail for each implemented behavior.
- Record this verification request in the task file `Validation` section.
- Record the user-verification artifact in the task file `Evidence` section using `Evidence-Type: user_feedback` or `Evidence-Type: manual_verification`.
- If user verification is still pending, set `Completion Status` to `Awaiting user verification`.
- Move to `300_complete` only after:
  1. implementation is done,
  2. technical validation is documented,
  3. required evidence items are captured,
  4. either:
     - user verification has been requested and outcome captured, or
     - auto-acceptance criteria have been met (`100%` coverage plus `Auto-Acceptance: true`).

## Evidence Rules
- Evidence exists to answer: "what artifact proves this task met its objective?"
- `Validation` remains the narrative of commands/checks performed; `Evidence` is the normalized proof inventory.
- Prefer artifact paths and concrete outputs over prose-only claims.
- If a task supports on-demand review, record the runnable/openable target as `Evidence-Type: demo` or `Evidence-Type: url`.
- If a single `.bat` file is the intended verification entry point for an API/webpage/executable package, record that `.bat` path explicitly and describe the components it wraps.
- Screenshots are supporting evidence, not a substitute for technical validation unless the task is purely visual and that limitation is documented.
- `Objective-Delivery-Coverage` is the normalized reviewer-facing summary of how completely the evidence proves the objective. It must be explicit for every qualifying task.
- `Auto-Acceptance` controls whether `100%` evidence can be promoted automatically or must remain manual-review only.

## Deliverable Packaging Rule

- For deliverables such as APIs, webpages, URLs, local apps, or executables, it is acceptable to provide a single review wrapper like `run_deliverable.bat` or `verify_deliverable.bat` when that is the cleanest way to package all required startup/open/check steps.
- The batch file should be deterministic and focused on reviewability: launch the app, open the page, hit the API, or run the verification checks needed to prove delivery.
- The lifecycle file should still name the real deliverable targets behind the wrapper, for example:
  - API base URL
  - local webpage URL
  - executable path
  - generated output path
- Prefer concise naming such as `open_demo.bat`, `run_api_demo.bat`, or `verify_delivery.bat` so reviewers understand the intent immediately.

## Example
- File name: `20260221_205458_breakout_full_json_archive_backfill.md`
- Flow:
1. Create in `workstream/100_backlog`.
2. If the pipeline suspends it temporarily, move it to `workstream/100_backlog/pending/...` and document the parking reason.
3. Move to `workstream/200_inprogress` while edits/tests run.
4. If the pipeline parks it as blocked or retry-pending, it may move to `workstream/100_backlog/blocker/...` or `workstream/200_inprogress/blocker/...`.
5. Move to `workstream/300_complete` after completion and validation.

# Twitter Canonical Posting & Automated Login Skill

This skill captures the high-reliability workflow for logging into Twitter/X using local credentials and publishing canonical strategy performance updates. It is designed to bypass common UI blockers and session corruption issues.

## 1. System Components
- **Credentials:** `C:\Users\edebe\eds\key.json` (JSON format with "username" and "password")
- **Login Automation:** `TradeApps/breakout/fs/auto_twitter_login.py`
- **Posting Automation:** `TradeApps/breakout/fs/run_twitter_post_v3.py`
- **Session Data:** `TradeApps/breakout/fs/twitter_session/`
- **Canonical Data Source:** `TradeApps/breakout/fs/temp_tweet.txt` (Updated by `generate_posting_package.py`)

## 2. Automated Login Workflow
If the session expires or "Something went wrong" appears on the login page:
1. **Kill existing Chrome instances:** `taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe`
2. **Execute Login Script:** `python auto_twitter_login.py`
3. **Behavior:** 
   - Automatically deletes the old `twitter_session` folder.
   - Opens a **visible** browser window.
   - Enters credentials from `key.json`.
   - **Manual Intervention:** If a CAPTCHA or Phone/Email verification appears, the script waits 60 seconds for the user to complete it in the visible window.

## 3. Background Posting Workflow
Use a strict gated workflow for scheduled updates. Every step depends on the previous step succeeding:
1. **Verify Local API First:** Confirm `GET http://localhost:5000/api/health` returns `{"status":"ok"}` before attempting any post.
2. **Refresh Data:** Run `generate_posting_package.py --date YYYY-MM-DD` to update `temp_tweet.txt`.
3. **Validate Prepared Payload:** Confirm `temp_tweet.txt` is non-empty, matches the generated `consolidated_twitter_post`, and remains within X length limits.
4. **Execute Gated Workflow:** `python run_twitter_canonical_workflow.py YYYY-MM-DD`
5. **Posting Internals:** The workflow submits the prepared text to `POST /api/social/x_api_post` and writes the exact live response to `TradeApps/breakout/fs/twitter_x_api_post_response.json`.
6. **Failure Rule:** If any step is unverified or ambiguous, the whole run fails and must not be marked complete.

## 4. Troubleshooting
- **Locked Profile:** If you see "Profile in use," run `taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe`.
- **404/Login Redirect:** If the post script fails with a login redirect, the session has expired. Re-run `auto_twitter_login.py`.
- **Post Button Blocked:** If the script fails to click the Post button, ensure `run_twitter_post_v3.py` is being used, as it implements the `Control+Enter` shortcut fallback.

## 5. Verification
- **Workflow Status:** Check `TradeApps/breakout/fs/twitter_workflow_status.json` for per-step gated status.
- **Route Response:** Check `TradeApps/breakout/fs/twitter_x_api_post_response.json` for the exact HTTP status and X API route payload used by the scheduled run.
- **Social Status:** Check `GET http://localhost:5000/api/social/status` for postability and recent post history when diagnosing blockers such as rate limits.
- **Browser Fallback:** If the X API path is unavailable and the task explicitly requires browser posting, fall back to the login and posting scripts above and record that deviation clearly.

C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\300_complete\20260311_162006_general_bizpa_mvp_product_requirements_document_workstreamG_implement_notification_engine_for_critical_important_and_informational_events.md:33:- 2026-03-11 16:38 Europe/London: Implemented the backend notification engine in `notificationService.js`, expanded `/api/v1/upcoming/notifications` to synthesize notifications from overdue invoices, readiness, snapshots, deadlines, sync health, and business events, and normalized persisted notification payloads in `notificationController.js`.
C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\300_complete\20260311_162006_general_bizpa_mvp_product_requirements_document_workstreamG_implement_notification_engine_for_critical_important_and_informational_events.md:43:  - Expanded the service from simple sorting into a full notification engine with canonical severity normalization, delivery-status normalization, condition-key generation, linked-target payloads, dedupe rules, health summaries, and rule builders for overdue invoices, readiness changes, stale snapshots, deadlines, sync health, and operational signals.
C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\300_complete\20260311_162006_general_bizpa_mvp_product_requirements_document_workstreamG_implement_notification_engine_for_critical_important_and_informational_events.md:121:The main changes are in [notificationService.js](C:/Users/edebe/eds/bizPA/backend/src/services/notificationService.js), [upcomingRoutes.js](C:/Users/edebe/eds/bizPA/backend/src/routes/upcomingRoutes.js), and [notificationController.js](C:/Users/edebe/eds/bizPA/backend/src/controllers/notificationController.js). The engine now builds standardized notification payloads for overdue invoices, readiness changes, stale snapshots, deadlines, sync-health issues, and operational signals, with canonical `critical` / `important` / `informational` severity, actionable `linked_target` data, dedupe by unresolved condition, and traceable `delivery_status`. I also added an additive schema migration at [notification_engine_migration.sql](C:/Users/edebe/eds/bizPA/backend/src/models/notification_engine_migration.sql) and a verifier at [verify_notification_engine.js](C:/Users/edebe/eds/bizPA/backend/verify_notification_engine.js).

C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\300_complete\20260331_152755_breakout_social_posting_canonical_product_return_calc.md:3:# Canonical Product Return Calculation For Social Posting## SourceUser request on 2026-03-31 to ensure consistency by always using the same return calculation for selecting the top 5 products in the social posting package.## Task Typestandard## Task Attributes- recurring_task: false- recurrence_type: none- recurrence_rule: none- priority: high- execution_owner: codex## Scope- Trace the canonical frontend/backend product-return calculation.- Update the social posting package to use that same calculation for top 5 product selection.- Apply the same product-return rule consistently across `Today` and `Weekly so far`.- Regenerate the posting package and record validation.## Acceptance Criteria- Top 5 products are selected by a single canonical product-return calculation.- No product preselection or product allowlist is encoded.- Social posting output uses the same calculation path consistently across runs.- Updated package is regenerated in a fresh dated folder without removing prior folders.## Notes- Initial investigation confirmed the need for one canonical rule in the posting package.- Canonical rule adopted for this task:  - for each product, take the highest available return row from the source dataset  - rank products by that best return  - publish the top 5 ranked products- This avoids hard-coded product selection and avoids inflated all-row summations.- Weekly so far requires week-to-date cumulative figures, not a stale Monday-only snapshot.## Progress Log- 2026-03-31 15:27:55: Task created in `workstream/100_todo`.- 2026-03-31 15:28:08: Task moved to `workstream/200_inprogress`.- 2026-03-31 15:29:20: Traced current social package inconsistency: `Today` and `Weekly so far` were using different product-ranking approaches.- 2026-03-31 15:31:50: Updated `TradeApps/breakout/fs/tools/social_posting_package/generate_posting_package.py` so both sections use the same canonical rule:  - `Today`: best return row per product from live dated `_top20.json`  - `Weekly so far`: cumulative sum of each day's best return row per product from live dated `_top20.json` files across the current week-to-date window- 2026-03-31 15:31:50: Regenerated output:  - `TradeApps/breakout/fs/json/live/social_posting_package/2026-03-31/top5_weekly_posting_package.json`  - `TradeApps/breakout/fs/json/live/social_posting_package/2026-03-31/top5_weekly_posting_package.md`- 2026-03-31 15:34:46: Corrected weekly logic after user clarified that `Weekly so far` must reflect Monday + Tuesday figures and cannot be below today's value for the same product when prior days are non-negative.## Validation- Command:  - `python C:\Users\edebe\eds\TradeApps\breakout\fs\tools\social_posting_package\generate_posting_package.py`- Result:  - generator completed successfully  - package written to dated folder `2026-03-31`- Verified current consolidated output:```textUpdate at 2026-03-31 15:34Today1. NQ 33852. CL 25703. ES 24854. SI 17755. YM 1245Weekly so far1. NQ 65152. CL 57803. ES 47754. SI 47755. YM 2615Full details to follow.#StrategyWarehouse #FuturesTrading #AlgoTrading```## Deliverable- Social posting package now uses one consistent top-5 product selection rule across both sections, with `Weekly so far` computed as week-to-date cumulative daily best-product returns.

Document","epic_slug":"bizpa_mvp_product_requirements_document","summary":"Decomposed the bizPA MVP PRD into granular backend, UI, governance, sync, export, and workflow validation tasks aligned to the MVP build order and quarter-ready trust goals.","warnings":["The PRD does not define an existing code architecture, so task outputs assume new modules, schemas, services, and UI surfaces will need to be introduced conservatively.","Biometric confirmation is specified as an MVP requirement, but the implementation mechanism is not defined; tasks assume a pluggable biometric/auth confirmation adapter rather than platform-specific hardware support.","Cloud sync, notification delivery, and connector work are scoped to MVP-safe foundations and export compatibility rather than full enterprise C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\artefacts\epic_decomp_20260311_160120_488785\epic_decomp_output.json:1:{"epic_name":"bizPA MVP","epic_slug":"bizpa_mvp","summary":"Decomposed the bizPA MVP PRD into granular backend, UI, governance, sync, export, and QA tasks aligned to the MVP build priority and quarter-ready export outcome.","warnings":["The PRD is feature-rich but under-specifies technical architecture, so task outputs assume a local-first app with API, persistence, background workers, and a web or desktop-viewable UI surface.","Biometric confirmation is treated as an integration boundary and policy hook in MVP unless a concrete platform biometric provider already exists.","UI tasks include viewability requirements inferred from the UI delivery skill: starter scripts, localhost access details, smoke startup validation, and screenshot evidence.","Accounting connectors are scoped as export/mapping contracts rather than live third-party integrations because direct integrations are explicitly de-prioritized for MVP."],"tasks":[{"id":"A1","title":"Define canonical business entity and quarter schemas","workstream_letter":"A","workstream_name":"Data Model & and document normalized schema contracts for invoices, receipts, payments, quotes, bookings, notes, attachments, reminders, clients, suppliers, quarters, and snapshots with explicit required/optional fields and invariant rules.","verification":["Schema definitions cover all MVP monetary and non-monetary entity types from the PRD.","Required and optional fields are documented with data types, contract."],"priority":1,"dependencies":[],"suggested_agent":"gemini","ui_viewability":false},{"id":"A2","title":"Design immutable event ledger schema and append-only history business events.","fields":["event_id","event_type","entity_id","entity_type","occurred_at","actor_id","quarter_reference","payload_summary","source_action","auto_commit_flag"],"action":"Define an append-only event contract for business events, governance events, snapshot events, and correction events, including ordering rules, immutable payload snapshots, and linkage to source entities.","verification":["Every mutable business action in MVP maps to a new event rather than in-place history edits.","Event types cover inbox-visible business events and governance actions changes."],"priority":1,"dependencies":["A1"],"suggested_agent":"gemini","ui_viewability":false},{"id":"A3","title":"Implement VAT calculation and monetary validation entity schemas, PRD sections 9, 10, 13, 14, and 17 covering VAT, net/gross consistency, and trust requirements.","output":"Reusable monetary calculation module with validation rules for VAT rate inputs, calculation outputs are deterministic across capture, readiness, snapshot, and export contexts.","Validation rejects inconsistent net/VAT/gross combinations and missing mandatory VAT metadata for committed monetary items.","Automated tests cover zero VAT, standard VAT, missing VAT rate, and malformed monetary payload C:\Users\edebe\eds\workstream\artefacts\epic_decomp_20260314_033802_165428\epic_decomp_output.json:1:{"epic_name":"MVP PRD — Mobile Quarterly Export in 10 Minutes (UK Sole Traders, Bank-Feed First)","epic_slug":"mvp_prd_mobile_quarterly_export_in_10_minutes_uk_sole_traders_bank_feed_first","summary":"Decomposed the MVP into granular backend, export, evidence, voice, UI, and verification tasks that align to the recommended build order and acceptance tests while keeping each task independently allocatable.","warnings":["The epic does not specify the mobile stack, backend framework, database, or Open Banking provider; tasks assume those choices can be made within implementation without changing MVP scope.","Authentication, onboarding, and secure token handling are inferred as required foundation work even though they are not broken out explicitly in the epic.","UI-visible tasks include local start-script, localhost access, smoke-start, and screenshot evidence requirements per the UI delivery viewability contract.","Receipt OCR/extraction is treated as best-effort metadata extraction, not a hard accuracy gate, because the epic defines confirmation-first decomposition treats it conservatively as dependent on infrastructure like the other platform connectors.","The source epic mixes backend, UI, and reporting concerns inside a few large tasks; these have been split into smaller independently allocatable increments while preserving intent.","Payment handling for premium tiers is under-specified; this decomposition limits MVP capture flow to Going to the barbershop is about more than just a haircut. It's a place to unwind and form friendships.\n\nCome down,  get a cut, hot towel shave, and socialize with the guys. Barbers | Male Grooming Lounge in Beckenham, London","description":"Great, reliable place – I've always gotten a great haircut here! My hair is quite difficult to cut as well, so I'm especially impressed.","position":3,"markdown":"[Skip to content](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/#main)\n\n## **MALE GROOMING LOUNGE**\n\nIN BECKENHAM, LONDON\n\n## **IMMERCE YOURSELF**\n\nIN ONE OF LONDON’S FINEST BARBERS\n\n## **AN AUTHENTIC EXPERIENCE**\n\nOF PRESTIGIOUS TURKISH BARBERING\n\n## **TURKISH BARBERING SKILL**\n\nINSPIRED BY QUINTESSENTIAL BRITISH STYLE\n\n# Welcome to Haks Barbers, our Traditional Turkish Barber\n\nHak’s Barbers was established in 1938, it started in Cyprus by the current owners grandfather. Due to the political issues of cyprus he chose to work for the English (RAF) and was transferred to the UK. In his absence his son (well known as Senior Hak at Hak’s barbers) was forced due to poverty and having such a large family to continue in Cyprus mastering the Art of Barbering at the age of 11, he became well known for cutting hair at such a young age and having to work on a box due to his height.\n\nSince then the experience and art of barbering has been passed down to Hak the current owner. Still today the experience and art of barbering continues to flow through the generations with the new edition Junior Hak\n\nYou can sometimes catch these three generations working side by side from Granddad, Son and Grandson.\n\nOur mission is to create a relaxed, fun salon environment whilst giving our customers a highly professional modern gentlemen’s hair and shave experience.\n\nAll our barbers are highly experienced at Hak’s barbers, to be a part of the team they have to have a minimum of 7 years experience and also go through a vigorous induction to qualify. They are passionate in what they do and have an artistic flair with modern and traditional barbering.\n\n![](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/Haks-Barbers-15-683x1024.jpg)\n\n![](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/Haks-Barbers-5-683x1024.jpg)\n\n### The Old Fire Station\n\nA red brick building on the corner of Kelsey Square (at one time the main entrance to Kelsey Manor), had a variety of uses.\n\nIt was the first meeting place of the Rural Sanitary Authority in 1872; then it was the Fire Station with the warning bell in the turret, which bell is now the ‘closing time’ bell in Kelsey Park; later it was occupied by the Y.M.C.A. there after the lower part was a greengrocer’s shop while the rooms over was used as a surveyor’s offices, in 1997 the Haks family occupy this great historic building trading as Hak’s Barbers till current day.\n\nOn the corner of the building is one of the old Village Pumps.\n\n[View Location](http://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/location)\n\n[View Treatments](http://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/treatments/)\n\n[Contact us](http://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/contact-us/)\n\n[View opening times](http://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/location)\n\n#### Our Reviews\n\nWicked barbers, everything is spot on even during Covid, they make you feel safe and comfortable. Couldn’t recommend them enough, perfect place for a haircut.\n\n**Dan Marsh**\n\n#### Our Reviews\n\nGreat, reliable place – I’ve always gotten a great haircut here!\n\nMy hair is quite difficult to cut as well, so I’m especially impressed.\n\n**Brian Law**\n\n#### Our Reviews\n\nWonderful and caring – lovely haircut given to my brother who has trouble communicating – very sympathetic and careful around his head operation scars.\n\n**Sumita Biswas**\n\n- [Home](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/)\n- [Treatments](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/treatments/)\n- [Location](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/location/)\n- [Gallery](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/gallery/)\n- [Contact us](https://www.haksbarbers.co.uk/contact-us/)\n- [Follow on Facebook](http://url/ \"Follow on Facebook\")[Follow on Instagram](http://url/ \"Follow on Instagram\")[Follow on Twitter](http://url/ \"Follow on Twitter\")[Send us an email](mailto:your@email \"Send us an email\")","metadata":{"og:description":"Male Grooming Lounge in Beckenham, London. Whether you're after a timeless look or something fresh and contemporary, we personalise every service to make sure you leave looking sharp and feeling fantastic!\n\n## Learn About Our Services\n\n![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5fabdb594c16d6380cc944f7/fabfe1f3-50fe-4dbd-908a-60a73bc18bbb/Donnelly%27s+Barber+Shop+-+Full+House.jpeg)\n\n- Haircut\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n30 minutes @ £29.00\n\n\n\nOur most popular service consists of a consultation, clippers on the side and scissors on the top to create the haircut of your choice.\n\n- Haircut and Beard Trim (without a Hot Towel)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n45 minutes @ £41.50\n\n\n\nGet your haircut plus let one of our barbers take care of your beard.\n\n- Scissor cut\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n45 minutes @ £36.00\n\n\n\nNo one likes to feel rushed so we allow a little extra time for a scissor cut.\n\n- Re-style\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n45 minutes @ £50.00\n\n\n\nBook if you're changing your style. We start with a thorough consultation before your haircut, extra time in the chair and a hair wash.\n\n- Haircut and Hot Towel Beard Trim\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n1 hour @ £48.00\n\n\n\nGet your haircut and relax with a Hot Towel Beard Trim. The service will be finished with a cut throat razor so please let your barber know if you have any sensitive areas on your face or neck.\n\n- Skin Fade\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n40 minutes @ £35.00\n\n\n\nSkin fades take a bit longer than other hair cuts so we have added extra time to get the fade on point.\n\n\nIf it's been over 6 months since your last haircut, kindly reach out to us in advance so we can schedule additional time for your I'm quite picky and go through phases of what I want, but Chris has always been accommodating and knows how make my hair look great. ”\n\n\n\n\n\nBrian Law\n\n\nItem 1 of 3\n\n[Book A Haircut](https://getsquire.com/booking/book/donnellys-barber-shop-london)\n\nMeet the Team\n\n- ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5fabdb594c16d6380cc944f7/6d7cf809-238b-417a-aa75-27351d01c4d3/EF89A172-38A8-41DC-8B69-CA66E8D8F74E.jpg)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n## Chris - Owner / Barber\n\n\n\n\n\nWhether you need a short, back and sides or a mullet, a beard trim or a full hot towel wet shave, Chris has you covered! Chris opened Donnelly’s in April 2021 and has felt right at home in Beckenham ever since. If you want a warm welcome and a great cut then [book online](https://www.donnellysbarbershop.com/book-online) today.\n\n- ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5fabdb594c16d6380cc944f7/f2e9f314-13d0-424c-909f-3eacc94cb1d3/Screenshot+2022-02-15+at+19.14.05.jpg)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n## Giulia - Senior Barber\n\n\n\n\n\nScissor cuts, fades, creative or classic styles are all part of Giulia’s repertoire. That’s why she has such a high client base here at Donnelly’s. When not at the shop you can find her running, cycling or pounding the keys on the piano. [Book here](https://www.donnellysbarbershop.com/book-online) to get a great cut and a friendly chat!\n\n- ![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5fabdb594c16d6380cc944f7/5f4b164a-bcec-41d9-ad4b-cd686c73b08d/8e213854-01eb-4f8a-8cb1-450d5717060c.JPG)\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n## Matt - Senior Barber\n\n\n\n\n\nAfter spending nine years working hard at Maclure’s Baber Shop in Manchester, Matt will be joining us at Donnelly’s from April. He is a master of the mullet but just at home doing a classic cut or fade so Matt has you covered this summer! As well as being a great barber, Geth is also back at uni studying phsychology.\n\n\n\nBrainy and creative! Great cuts, great chat, what’s not to like? Services\n\n### Skin Fade\n\n\"Skin fades\" are the cuts that begin almost right down to the\nskin at the back of the neck and slowly (or quickly) taper to\nlonger hair as it works up your head.\n\n\n##### Time : 30 Min\n\n### Cut Throat\n\nShaving with a cut throat razor is certainly one of life's\npleasures as it will give you the closest possible shave.\n\n\n##### Time : 30 Min\n\n### Scissor Cut\n\nThe hair blends in better with a scissors cut, and the hair\ngrows in more naturally.\n\n\n##### Time : 30 Min\n\n### HOT SHAVE\n\nHave a traditional hot towel shave.\n\n##### Time : 30 Min\n\n## Gull's Explore our premium options for haircuts, shaves, and grooming.","position":8,"markdown":"[Skip to content](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/about-us/#content)\n\n[![sharp crystal logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-01.png)](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/)\n\n[![sharp crystal logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-01.png)](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/)\n\n# about us\n\n[home](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/)\n\n##### about us\n\n## Sharp Crystal barbershop\n\nAt **Sharp Crystal**, grooming isn’t just a service—it’s an art perfected over **11 years** of dedication and expertise. We combine tradition and innovation to create tailored experiences that redefine grooming standards for our clients.\n\nOur focus is on precision, quality, and style. Whether it’s a clean shave, a modern hairstyle, or a touch of facial refinement, our skilled team ensures that every detail is executed to perfection.\n\nWhat sets us apart is our commitment to making every client feel their absolute best. With an eye for detail and a passion for excellence, we’ve earned our reputation as a trusted name in the grooming industry.\n\n- **Razor Trimming**: Precision and sharpness for the perfect edge\n- **Hair Styling**: Classic cuts to contemporary looks, styled just for you.\n- **Facial Grooming**: Refresh and rejuvenate with expert care.\n- **Royal Beard Treatment**: Tailored grooming for a majestic beard.\n\nDiscover the art of fine grooming at **Sharp Crystal**, where style meets sophistication.\n\n![Trending hairstyle](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/WhatsApp-Image-2024-11-22-at-11.03.19-AM-2-e1732275208531.jpeg)\n\n![Two men's showing victory](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/about-pik.jpg)\n\n0+\n\n### Years Experience\n\n## popular service\n\nExplore a world of premium grooming at **Sharp Crystal**, where every service is designed to make you look and feel your best.\n\n![Razor Shaver](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Razor-Shaver.png)\n\n### Razor Shaver\n\nThe razor shaver provides a precise, smooth cut for a clean and sharp finish.\n\n[Call Us Now](tel:+442046199933)\n\n![Razor Shaver](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Razor-Shaver1.jpg)\n\n![Mustache Trim](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mustache-Trim-1.png)\n\n### Moustache Trim\n\nA meticulous Moustache trim for a clean, defined look that complements your style.\n\n[Call Us Now](tel:+442046199933)\n\n![Mustache Trim](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Mustache-Trim1.jpg)\n\n![Under Shaver](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Under-Shave-1.png)\n\n### Under Shave\n\nThe under shave offers a bold, clean look with sharp contrasts\n\n[Call Us Now](tel:+442046199933)\n\n![Under Shave](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/Under-Shave-1-1.jpg)\n\nTransform your look with precision cuts, expert shaves, and personalized styling. Our skilled barbers combine traditional techniques with modern trends to give you a grooming experience like no other. Step in and walk out with confidence.\n\n[all services](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/services/)\n\n## what we do\n\nAt **Sharp Crystal**, we provide tailored grooming services that enhance your appearance and confidence. Our expert barbers are dedicated to delivering the finest haircuts, shaves, and trims, ensuring every detail is perfect.\n\n![Trending hairstyle](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/WhatsApp-Image-2024-11-22-at-11.03.19-AM-4-e1732257678370.jpeg)\n\n### Razor Shaver\n\nThe Razor Shaver service at Sharp Crystal, offers a precise, smooth cut for a clean and sharp finish.\n\n[read more](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/about-us/#)\n\n![hair style](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/WhatsApp-Image-2024-11-22-at-11.03.20-AM-1-e1732257738587.jpeg)\n\n### Moustache Trim\n\nAchieve a perfect look with our Mustache Trim service, designed for a clean and defined mustache that complements your face and style.\n\n[read more](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/about-us/#)\n\n![happy customer](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/WhatsApp-Image-2024-11-22-at-11.03.20-AM-5-e1732257979151.jpeg)\n\n### Under Shave\n\nAt Sharp Crystal, the Under Shave offers a bold, clean look with sharp contrasts and precise detailing.\n\n[read more](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/about-us/#)\n\n## SERVICES & PRICING\n\nAt **Sharp Crystal**, we offer exceptional grooming services tailored to your style. Explore our premium options for haircuts, shaves, and grooming.\n\n![logo sharpcristal](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-sharpcristal-01.png)\n\n##### Dry Haircut\n\n## £22\n\n##### Skin Fade\n\n## £24\n\n##### Wash & Cut\n\n## £25\n\n##### Senior Haircut\n\n## £17\n\n![logo sharpcristal](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-sharpcristal-01.png)\n\n##### Kids Haircut (under 12)\n\n## £18\n\n##### Crew Cut\n\n## £16\n\n##### Beard Design\n\n## £17\n\n##### Hot Towel Shave\n\n## £20\n\n![logo sharpcristal](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-sharpcristal-01.png)\n\n##### Beard Trim\n\n## £14\n\n##### Waxing\n\n## £8\n\n##### SHARP CRYSTAL SPECIAL PACKAGE\n\n## £42\n\n![NIVEA logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/NIVEA.png)\n\n![KEUNE logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/KEUNE.png)\n\n![DERMACOS logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/DERMACOS.png)\n\n![Set Wet logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/SET-WET.png)\n\n[![sharp crystal logo](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/logo-01-1024x1024.png)](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/)\n\nMaintain your best look and elevate your grooming routine with **Sharp Crystal**, where precision meets style.\n\n#### Links\n\n- [Home](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/)\n- [About](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/about-us/)\n- [Services](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/services/)\n- [Contact](https://sharpcrystal.co.uk/contact-us/)\n\n#### Sharp location\n\n- 21 Westow St, London SE19 3RY, United Kingdom\n- [+44 2046199933](tel:+44%202046199933)\n- Mon - Tell us what we’re missing.\n\nAdd a business\n\n### Frequently asked questions\n\n#### How do I choose the right barber for my haircut?\n\nWhen selecting a barber in Crystal Palace, here’s what you should look for:\n\n- **Strong customer reviews and ratings**\n\n- **Evidence of previous work**\n\n- **Experience with your preferred hair style and type**\n\n- **Registration with reputable industry bodies, like the** [**British Barbers’ Association (BBA)**](https://britishbarbers.com/)\n\n- **Holds relevant insurance, such as public liability insurance**\n\n- **Clear, written barber price list**\n\n\nMany barbershops in Crystal Palace specialise in particular hair types, such as Afro barbers, or techniques, like how **Turkish barbers are known for detailed grooming and hot towel shaves**.\n\nChecking customer reviews and recent photos of work can help you find a barber who matches your expectations, but you should also **make sure the barbershop is hygienic and the barbering implements are regularly cleaned**.\n\n#### Do barbers take walk-ins or do I need to book an appointment?\n\nThere are many walk-in barbers in Crystal Palace that offer immediate service for convenience, though **appointments are recommended for peak times or when booking a specific barber**. Without an appointment, you may have to wait in a queue.\n\nSome gents barbers now offer online booking systems, making it easier to schedule your visit at a time that suits you. In some cases, though, **barbers in Crystal Palace may only offer walk-ins**.\n\n#### How much does a typical barber service cost?\n\nA standard men’s haircut may range from **£15 to £35**, with certain styles (like fades) adding to the cost; beard trims or restyling services can add extra as well. Turkish barbers in Crystal Palace may also include luxury treatments such as face masks or hot towel shaves for a higher fee.\n\nIt’s always best to **check the barber price list before booking or going for a walk-in**. Barber prices can change pretty frequently, so even if you’ve visited a specific barber in Crystal Palace before, there’s no harm in making sure.\n\n#### What services do barbers typically provide besides haircuts?\n\nThink you might want more than just a haircut? Many barbershops in Crystal Palace also offer these services:\n\n- **Beard shaping and styling**\n\n- **Hair colouring**\n\n- **Hair and scalp treatments**\n\n- **Facial services**\n\n- **Straight razor shaves**\n\n- **Waxing**\n\n- **Eyebrow shaping**\n\n- **Ear and nose hair removal**\n\n\nThese services aren’t always available, so **it’s worth consulting barbershop price lists**; some may specialise in luxury grooming experiences, including scalp massages and waxing.\n\nWhether you’re after a quick trim or a full grooming package, [local barbers](https://www.yell.com/l/barbers/) in Crystal Palace can tailor their services to suit your preferences and budget.\n\n#### Are barbers open late or available on weekends?\n\nLooking for barbers open now? Many barbers in Crystal Palace understand that customers need flexibility, so **you’ll find a number of barbers offering extended evening and weekend hours**.\n\nWith that said, it’s always best to **check each shop’s opening times online or call ahead**, especially if you’re planning a last-minute visit. Tell us what we’re missing.\n\nAdd a business\n\n### Frequently asked questions\n\n#### How do I choose the right barber for my haircut?\n\nWhen selecting a barber in Crystal Palace, here’s what you should look for:\n\n- **Strong customer reviews and ratings**\n\n- **Evidence of previous work**\n\n- **Experience with your preferred hair style and type**\n\n- **Registration with reputable industry bodies, like the** [**British Barbers’ Association (BBA)**](https://britishbarbers.com/)\n\n- **Holds relevant insurance, such as public liability insurance**\n\n- **Clear, written barber price list**\n\n\nMany barbershops in Crystal Palace specialise in particular hair types, such as Afro barbers, or techniques, like how **Turkish barbers are known for detailed grooming and hot towel shaves**.\n\nChecking customer reviews and recent photos of work can help you find a barber who matches your expectations, but you should also **make sure the barbershop is hygienic and the barbering implements are regularly cleaned**.\n\n#### Do barbers take walk-ins or do I need to book an appointment?\n\nThere are many walk-in barbers in Crystal Palace that offer immediate service for convenience, though **appointments are recommended for peak times or when booking a specific barber**. Without an appointment, you may have to wait in a queue.\n\nSome gents barbers now offer online booking systems, making it easier to schedule your visit at a time that suits you. In some cases, though, **barbers in Crystal Palace may only offer walk-ins**.\n\n#### How much does a typical barber service cost?\n\nA standard men’s haircut may range from **£15 to £35**, with certain styles (like fades) adding to the cost; beard trims or restyling services can add extra as well. Turkish barbers in Crystal Palace may also include luxury treatments such as face masks or hot towel shaves for a higher fee.\n\nIt’s always best to **check the barber price list before booking or going for a walk-in**. Barber prices can change pretty frequently, so even if you’ve visited a specific barber in Crystal Palace before, there’s no harm in making sure.\n\n#### What services do barbers typically provide besides haircuts?\n\nThink you might want more than just a haircut? Many barbershops in Crystal Palace also offer these services:\n\n- **Beard shaping and styling**\n\n- **Hair colouring**\n\n- **Hair and scalp treatments**\n\n- **Facial services**\n\n- **Straight razor shaves**\n\n- **Waxing**\n\n- **Eyebrow shaping**\n\n- **Ear and nose hair removal**\n\n\nThese services aren’t always available, so **it’s worth consulting barbershop price lists**; some may specialise in luxury grooming experiences, including scalp massages and waxing.\n\nWhether you’re after a quick trim or a full grooming package, [local barbers](https://www.yell.com/l/barbers/) in Crystal Palace can tailor their services to suit your preferences and budget.\n\n#### Are barbers open late or available on weekends?\n\nLooking for barbers open now? Many barbers in Crystal Palace understand that customers need flexibility, so **you’ll find a number of barbers offering extended evening and weekend hours**.\n\nWith that said, it’s always best to **check each shop’s opening times online or call ahead**, especially if you’re planning a last-minute visit. You can easily find barber opening times on Yell in just a few seconds.\n\nRelated searches:\n\n[Afro Hairdressers](https://www.yell.com/s/afro+hairdressers-crystal+palace-south+east+london.html Wether it’s a style change, beard trim or shape up, you are always made to feel relaxed and comfortable in our luxury salon. We are not an ordinary barbers that you may have been to before. We have a vast range of services all under one roof for the those that want the full gentleman experience. Our barbers specialize in styling and cutting men’s hair, including fades and undercuts. We also offer beard-trimming services and a variety of hair products to suit every need. Our team of experienced barbers offer modern and traditional styles, and we strive to ensure our clients leave looking and feeling their best. At Fade Cave, we pride ourselves on providing an enjoyable atmosphere and excellent customer service.\n\nWe make sure to get to know our clients and provide them with a tailored experience. Our barbers are always up to date with the latest trends and styles, so our clients can be confident they’ll leave with a look they love. We specialize in haircuts, beard grooming, & personalized care. Book your appointment today!","position":1,"markdown":"![Logo for Hourani's Barbershop with stylized lettering, a barber's pole outline, and ](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/BARBERSHOP-LOGO-TRqns-95cce35d-1920w.png)\n\n#### Get in touch\n\n555-555-5555\n\nmymail@mailservice.com\n\n[facebook](https://facebook.com/)[instagram](http://instagram.com/)[linkedin](http://linkedin.com/)\n\n[facebook](https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100049516423868&mibextid=wwXIfr&rdid=vXiMCKnMUHU4A6dS#)[instagram](https://www.instagram.com/houranisbarbershop/?igsh=cW1hcGdoeHowbXNx&utm_source=qr#)\n\n## Hourani’s Barbershop delivers precision grooming with a luxury experience. Our skilled barbers specialize in clean fades, classic cuts, beard grooming, and modern styles tailored to each client. We focus on attention to detail, consistency, and top-tier customer service because every visit should feel personal, professional, and worth coming back for.\n\n## Our Story\n\n### A Tradition Born in 1983\n\nIn the old streets of Sida, Lebanon, a young barber began offering haircuts freely not for attention, but for mastery. Every cut refined his skill. Every client earned his trust. What began humbly became the foundation of a legacy.\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n### Generations of Discipline\n\nWith borrowed tools and hand-me-down furniture, my father, Mohamad Hourani 'Mike', built his first shop, which was for both men and women. Through wars, uncertainty, and change, he worked with precision and pride. Those principles were passed down, not taught, but lived.\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n### Elevated Barbering\n\nAt Hourani's, every detail matters. Clean lines. Thoughtful technique. Consistent excellence. Our work reflects decades of experience and respect for the craft, delivered with modern refinement.\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n### Because Legacy Endures\n\nHourani's Barbershop exists to honor where we began and elevate where we are going. This is not simply grooming. It is tradition, carried forward with intention.\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n* * *\n\n* * *\n\n## Styles\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Straight-1920w.png)\n\nStraight\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Wavy-1920w.png)\n\nWavy\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Curly-1920w.png)\n\nCurly\n\n[![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Kinky-1920w.png)](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\nKinky\n\n* * *\n\n## Services\n\n![Scissors hanging on a wooden wall, some with black or dark green handles.](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/BW+Barbert+Pole-1920w.jpg)\n\n- ### ✂️ Hair & Grooming Services\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n  - Classic Haircuts — Standard adult haircuts with styling (e.g., slick backs, quiffs, pomps, comb-overs, fades).\n\n  - Kids’ Haircuts — Haircuts tailored for children.\n\n  - Beard Shave, Trim & Line-Up — Razor shaving or trimming with defined cheek-lines, necklines, and mustache shaping.\n\n  - Hair & Beard Combo — A combined service for both haircut and beard grooming (often a popular choice).\n\n- ### 🧴 Specialized Grooming\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n  -  Hair Coloring — Adds color to the hair for style or coverage.\n\n  - Beard Coloring — Color applied to the beard.\n\n  - Hair Keratin Treatment — Smoothing treatment to reduce frizz and add shine.\n\n- ### 🪒 Additional Personal Care\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n  - Face Wax & Nose/Ear Wax — Waxing services for facial hair and delicate areas like nose and ears.\n\n  - Eyebrow Grooming — Shaping or trimming of eyebrows.\n\n  - Facial Exfoliation & Skin Vapor Cleansing — A deeper skincare treatment.\n\n  - Facial Scrub & Black Mask — Additional skincare service\n\n* * *\n\n## ReviewS\n\nFast and always cuts exactly how I need. Great service!\n\n##### [**Jonathan Harris**](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111994259877021322945/reviews?hl=en-US)\n\n1 week ago\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Screenshot+2026-01-21+at+12.23.52-PM-1920w.png)\n\nAn absolutely wonderful barber. The results are always on point. The owner is a great guy with exceptional skills—he knows exactly what to do and never fails to give me the look I’m going for. Highly recommended without a doubt.\n\n##### [**Nhan Nguyen**](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/106900432453339803337/reviews?hl=en-US)\n\n1 months ago\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Screenshot+2026-01-21+at+12.23.52-PM-1920w.png)\n\nI was looking for a barber for an interview I have coming up, I walked in and Mike sat me instantly. I showed him a photo of a hair cut i received in the past and he made it beter then what I showed, after seeing it when he was done I was excited about how I would look for my interview.\n\n[**wolfis wolf**](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/105831354175289224758/reviews?hl=en-US)\n\n1 months ago\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Screenshot+2026-01-21+at+12.23.52-PM-1920w.png)\n\nBeen going here for the last 3 years. Never left dissatisfied. The guys here always greeted everyone with a smile and make sure every gentleman is pampered. Would definitely recommend and will keep on coming back. 11/10 <3\n\n[**Long Truong**](https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/111616297689766351664/reviews?hl=en-US)\n\n6 months ago\n\n![](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Screenshot+2026-01-21+at+12.23.52-PM-1920w.png)\n\n* * *\n\n## Location\n\n### 12121 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX, USA\n\n### (346) 677-3353\n\n### [info@houranisbarbershop.com](mailto:info@houranisbarbershop.com)\n\n* * *\n\n* * *\n\n## Our Team\n\n### Barber Name\n\nAbout the  barber\n\n### Name Lastname\n\nJob Title\n\n### Name Lastname\n\nJob Title\n\n### Name Lastname\n\nJob Title\n\n* * *\n\n## Portfolio\n\n#### Link Your Instagram Account (H4)\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n[Button](https://www.houranisbarbershop.com/)\n\n![Logo for Hourani's Barbershop with stylized lettering, a barber's pole outline, and ](https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Hourani-s-barbershop-logo-1920w.png)\n\n##### CONTACT  US\n\n### 12121 Westheimer Road, Houston, TX, USA\n\n### (346) 677-3353\n\n### [info@houranisbarbershop.com](mailto:info@houranisbarbershop.com)\n\n##### Hours\n\n### Monday 9:00 am - 7:00 pm\n\n### Tuesday - Sunday 9:00 am - 8:00 pm\n\nSQUIRE - Book an appointment\n\nBook now","metadata":{"apple-mobile-web-app-capable":"yes","twitter:image":"https://lirp.cdn-website.com/251fc86c/dms3rep/multi/opt/Hourani-s+barbershop+logo-1920w.png","og:description":"Enjoy luxury grooming at Hourani’s Barbershop. Haircuts only.\n[SCHEDULE AN APPOINTMENT](https://classicfadez.com/#) [CALL US\\\\\n(832) 640-2325](tel:+18326402325)\n\nMay 3rd, 2026\n\n## Classic Fadez Showdown\n\nBarber Competition at Roman Empire Gym\n\n$200\n\nRegistration Fee\n\nRegister now to compete in 5 categories. 1st, 2nd & 3rd place cash prizes and gifts.\n\nLocation\n\nRoman Empire Open Gym\n\nTime\n\n1:00 PM – 5:00 PM\n\nCategories\n\n5 Competition Categories\n\n[Register Now →](https://classicfadez.com/pages/classic-fadez-showdown-form)\n\n## OurServices\n\nPremium Grooming Services Tailored to Your Style\n\n### Gold Barber\n\nHaircut & Style\n\nW$35\n\nA$40\n\nHaircut & Style + Beard Lineup\n\nW$45\n\nA$50\n\nKids Haircuts\n\nW$30\n\nA$35\n\n12 Years & Under\n\nSenior Haircut\n\nW$30\n\nA$35\n\n60 Years and Up\n\n### Silver Barber\n\nHaircut & Style\n\nW$30\n\nA$35\n\nHaircut & Style + Beard Lineup\n\nW$40\n\nA$45\n\nKids Haircuts\n\nW$25\n\nA$30\n\n12 Years & Under\n\nSenior Haircut\n\nW$25\n\nA$30\n\n60 Years and Up\n\n### Extra Services\n\nEyebrows$5\n\nDesigns$5+\n\nHeadwash$10\n\nHot Towel and Massage$10\n\nLineup All Around$20\n\nAfter Hours$120+\n\nWWalk-ins\n\nAAppointment\n\n[Book Your Appointment](https://classicfadez.com/#)\n\n## OurBarbers\n\nMaster Craftsmen Dedicated to Your Style\n\n\n★ Gold ★\n\n\n\n![Diego](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/image0_600x600.jpg?v=1754848675)\n\n### Diego\n\nBarber Info\n\n### Diego\n\n4+ Years\n\nWhat’s good y’all it’s Diego at Classic Fadez, where creating sauce starts with creativity & passion. From gentlemen’s cuts to bald fades, designs, & beards, we get down & do it all. Ready to have you looking your best with the sharpest lines around town. Come check us out have a complimentary drink & enjoy a good time in my chair!\n\nSpecialties\n\nFades & TapersAsian HairModern Styles\n\n← Close\n\n\n★ Silver ★\n\n\n\n![Xavier](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/IMG_2979_600x600.jpg?v=1754852167)\n\n### Xavier\n\nBarber Info\n\n### Xavier\n\n3+ Years\n\nDedicated to delivering clean fades, precise beard trims, and smooth shaves every time. I’m all about quality, consistency, and helping you walk out with confidence. Whether you’re after a clean professional look or something bold, I’ve got the tools and skills to make it happen.\n\nSpecialties\n\nScissor/layer Mod CutLow/Mid/High TaperMid/High Fades\n\n← Close\n\n\n★ Gold ★\n\n\n\n![Hector](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/IMG_0870_600x600.jpg?v=1754848821)\n\n### Hector\n\nBarber Info\n\n### Hector\n\n5+ Years\n\nI'm Hector, a professional barber located in League City, dedicated to providing top quality cuts & styles. If you're looking for precision & first class service, you've come to the right place.\n\nSpecialties\n\nLow FadesSlick BackDesigns\n\n← Close\n\n\n★ Silver ★\n\n\n\n![Daniel](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/IMG_0912_600x600.jpg?v=1754848857)\n\n### Daniel\n\nBarber Info\n\n### Daniel\n\n1 Year\n\nI’m Daniel , a dedicated barber with a passion for clean fades, sharp lines & fresh styles. Whether you’re coming in for a classic cut or a modern look, I bring precision, consistency, & attention to detail every time. More than just a haircut, it’s about confidence, style &  great vibes. Definitely the only person I trust to cut my hair. He is quick, efficient, and personable with his clients!!\n\n![Garrett D.](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/2e6b91753165431586fcbb87ae3f5e-classic-fadez-barbershop-inspiration-cce3e5b02afa43f08bd5862684828e-booksy_120x120.jpg?v=1755554706)\n\n#### Garrett D.\n\nHaircut & Style\n\n★★★★★\n\nHector is amazing when it comes to kids, he listened to what my grandson wanted and executed it..\n\n![Liz M.](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/7aa84af125a5466fa288210146b911b5_120x120.jpg?v=1755553929)\n\n#### Liz M.\n\nKid’s Haircut 12yr & Under\n\n★★★★★\n\nVery detailed and thorough\n\n![Ronald C.](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/57b796d651f247b186a656558dda6808_120x120.jpg?v=1755553981)\n\n#### Ronald C.\n\nHaircut & Style\n\n★★★★★\n\nHector is awesome. My son won’t go with anyone else but him. He provides outstanding customer service and his work is amazing.\n\n![Laura S.](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/5316209d95624e9a92eb242ba0c38805_120x120.jpg?v=1755554163)\n\n#### Laura S.\n\nKid’s Haircut 12yr & Under\n\n[Book Your Appointment](https://classicfadez.com/#)\n\n## FAQ\n\nEverything You Need to Know\n\n### Do I need To Make An Appointment, Or Do You Accept Walk-ins?\n\nWe Welcome Both! Appointments Are Recommended To Avoid Wait Times, But We Gladly Accept Walk-ins Based On Availability.\n\n### How Do I Book An Appointment?\n\nYou Can Book Online Through Our Website Or Via Our App (Booksy)\n\n### What Are Your Hours Of Operation?\n\n• Monday-Friday: 9 AM - 7:30 PM\n\n•Saturday: 8:30 AM - 5 PM\n\n• Sunday: Closed\n\n### How Much Does A Haircut Cost?\n\nPrices Vary Depending On The Barber Gold Or Silver & Service\n\n### What’s A Gold Barber & Silver Barber?\n\nA Classification That Recognizes Barbers Based On Their Level Of Experience.\n\n### Do You Cut Children's Hair?\n\nYes, We Offer Haircuts For Children Of All Ages.\n\n### What Payment Methods Do You Accept?\n\nWe Accept Cash, Credit/Debit Cards, Digital Payments Contactless , Cash app, & Zelle.\n\n### What's Your Cancellation Policy?\n\nWe Kindly Ask For At Least 1 Hour  Notice Cancellations Or Rescheduling To Avoid Fees.\n\n### Why Do You Need To Add Card To Schedule Appointment?\n\nAdding Your Card Is Only To Secure Your Appointment, You Pay After Service Completed.\n\n### Do you offer gift cards?\n\nYes, gift cards are available in any amount and make great gifts.\n\n[schedule an appointment](https://classicfadez.com/#)\n\n## OurStory\n\nA Legacy of Excellence Since 2019\n\n![Our Story](https://classicfadez.com/cdn/shop/files/2c6e583689644009a486f85096f066-classic-fadez-barbershop-biz-photo-288d1ce5a73a4c8d864c834746b87b-booksy.jpg?v=1755464850)\n\n### Classic Fadez Journey\n\nEstablished in 2019, Classic Fadez Barbershop has quickly become a staple in League City, offering a Classic barbershop experience with a modern touch.\n\nLocated in the heart of the city, we are proud to bring traditional barbering skills to the community, providing top-notch haircuts, shaves, & grooming services for men of all ages.\n\nWith a team of 10 skilled barbers, we specialize in everything from clean fades to timeless scissor cuts, offering both walk-ins & appointments to fit your busy schedule. Whether you're here for a quick trim or a complete style refresh, our barbers take the time to ensure you leave looking & feeling your best.\n\nAt Classic Fadez Barbershop , it's all about quality, precision, & building relationships with our clients. Our welcoming atmosphere, combined with expert service, makes every visit an experience to remember. Come see why we're League City's go-to barbershop - where tradition meets style, & great cuts never go out of fashion.\n\nEnhancing your experienceby offering complimentary drinks for all our clients. Grab a cold one, kick back, & enjoy the experience !\n\n#### 15+\n\nYears of Excellence\n\n#### 50,000+\n\nSatisfied Clients\n\n#### 10+\n\nMaster Barbers\n\n[Book Your Appointment](https://classicfadez.com/#)\n\n## VisitOurShop\n\nClassic Location, Timeless Service\n\n### Classic Fadez Barbershop\n\n#### Location\n\n2910 Gulf Fwy S\n\nSuite B\n\nLeague City, TX 77573\n\n[Get Directions](https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=2910+Gulf+Fwy+S+Suite+B+League+City%2C+TX+77573)\n\n#### Contact\n\n[(832) 640-2325](tel:8326402325)\n\n#### Hours\n\nMonday\n9:00 AM - 7:30 PM\nTuesday\n9:00 AM - 7:30 PM\nWednesday\n9:00 AM - 7:30 PM\nThursday\n9:00 AM - 7:30 PM\nFriday\n9:00 AM - 7:30 PM\nSaturday\n8:30 AM - 5:00 PM\nSunday\nClosed\n\n\nFree parking available in front of building\n\n\n[Book Your Visit](https://classicfadez.com/#)\n\n## OurShop\n\nCraftsmanship in Every Dimension\n\nLoading 3D Model...\n\nOur iconic logo represents decades of tradition and excellence in men's grooming. Don’t rely on luck for a fresh cut — come get the real gold at Classic Fadez. 💈✨\n\nWhether you’re heading to a party, the parade, or just want to look sharp, our barbers will have your fade hitting harder than a pot of gold at the end of the rainbow. 🌈✂️\n\nPull up, grab a chair, and leave looking clean, sharp, and lucky.\n\n🍀 Walk-ins welcome\n📍 Classic Fadez\n\n#StPatricksDay #ClassicFadez #LuckyFade #FreshCutsOnly #BarbershopVibes\n\nMarch 15\n\n✕\n\n![Instagram profile picture](https://scontent.cdninstagram.com/v/t51.82787-19/626774327_18360794968164466_6312693573465167159_n.jpg?stp=dst-jpg_s206x206_tt6&_nc_cat=106&ccb=7-5&_nc_sid=bf7eb4&efg=eyJ2ZW5jb2RlX3RhZyI6InByb2ZpbGVfcGljLnd3dy4xMDgwLkMzIn0%3D&_nc_ohc=UdPGH1kY53AQ7kNvwG7e2Hh&_nc_oc=AdpfB3AsR4_902ijPhveZrcDSMOYpCDAChnBsYt1snuSor82JngjKD2aPtq1INHY2hE&_nc_zt=24&_nc_ht=scontent.cdninstagram.com&edm=AP4hL3IEAAAA&_nc_gid=u0WZ0nfyYeD30T6HmYy7cg&_nc_tpa=Q5bMBQGIInRMq5UE_xwMUfXl4OwCet88xatep6sfT1T1jJN8DsoJRn1ZjR1ydZrDGs1h3BmiTWanNuw-&oh=00_AfzbP5FwwJAsTF66GDLD__-tHi6efEYeAbipSAbi6p8wPQ&oe=69C6DF50)\n\n[classic\\_fadez](https://www.instagram.com/reel/DV03wfJDfl5/)\n\nEstablished in 2019, Classic Fadez Barbershop in League City delivers a classic barbershop experience with a modern touch. 💈\n\nOur team of 10 skilled barbers specializes in everything from clean fades to timeless scissor cuts, offering both walk-ins and appointments to fit your schedule.\n\nAt Classic Fadez, it’s all about quality, precision, and building real relationships with our clients. ✂️\n\nMarch 13\n\n✕\n\n![Instagram post with the caption: ✂️🎉 You’re Invited! Get 1/2 Off Your First Visit and Feed a Homeless Vet.\n\n[CLAIM YOUR 1/2 OFF FIRST VISIT](https://thegentsplace.com/dp-landing/)\n\n### Working Hours\n\nMonday - Friday 9:00 AM - 8:00 PM\n\nSaturday9:00 AM - 6:00 PM\n\nSundayCLOSED\n\n### Houston Washington Heights, TX MEN’S GROOMING SERVICES\n\n**Become a member for exceptional men’s grooming services and personalized care.**\n\n[Join Today!](https://thegentsplace.com/membership/)\n\n![LeawoodImage-1](https://thegentsplace.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/LeawoodImage-1.png)\n\n## The Gents Place Houston Washington Heights\n\nSo much more than a barbershop. Located on Shepherd Drive between Washington Avenue and Katy Freeway with plenty of complimentary parking. Our members and guests can enjoy private spaces for business meetings while they wait for one of the most unique service menus in the grooming industry. Enjoy an incredible haircut experience and the best shave in town while taking advantage of all of the luxuries of a modern spa for gentlemen. Convenient to River Oaks, the Galleria, Memorial area, Rice Military, The Heights, Midtown and Downtown.\n\nOur menu of services includes everything from haircuts and styles to straight razor shaves, beard trims, hand, and foot repair treatments, and shoe shines. We believe that a gentleman who looks and feels his confident best is empowered to change the world.\n\n[713-880-5858 (Text or\\\\\nCall)](tel:713-880-5858)\n\n![location-texture-odd](https://thegentsplace.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/location-texture-odd.jpg)\n\n![](https://thegentsplace.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/visit-us-Image-1.png)\n\n## A Great Haircut is Just the Beginning\n\nEnjoy a place where distinguished gentlemen gather for conversation and drinks while receiving luxury grooming services such as steamed towel treatments, neck and shoulder massages, and facial hair maintenance.\n\nOur Houston Washington Heights location has the exclusive yet welcoming atmosphere of a members-only club while ensuring men are able to keep up a regular grooming schedule. With our men’s grooming clubs, we strive to bring back the gentleman in all of us.\n\nLife is not an errand, nor should we treat it as such. When it prompts us to attend to a task with regularity, we might as well attend to it while surrounded by like-minded gentlemen, complimentary top-shelf drinks, and curated advice. Such is the path to looking our best, feeling our best, and becoming our best.\n\n[713-880-5858 (Text or\\\\\nCall)](tel:713-880-5858)\n\n![](https://thegentsplace.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/location-texture-even.jpg)\n\n## THE MEMBERSHIP PERKS OF   OUR ELITE CLUBS WILL MAKE ANY MAN ENVIOUS\n\nAustin, TX – Great Hills\nBentonville @ Walmart Campus\nBentonville, AR\nDallas, TX – Uptown\nDeer Park, IL\nFrisco, TX @ The Star\nFt. MONTROSE & HEIGHTS\n\n![](https://tradesmenbarber.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Hands.png)\n\n**TRADESMEN** is a barber concept with two Houston locations—in the Heights and Montrose—drawing creative inspiration from film, photography, and design. As a locally owned business, we’re proud to support the wealth of talent our city offers. Our Heights shop is Houston’s first pink barbershop, while our Montrose location has been serving the community for over five years. We look forward to welcoming you to Tradesmen and creating genuine connections with everyone who walks through our doors.\n\n[BOOK MONTROSE](https://square.site/book/TSMJZPKBPFPCN/tradesmen-barber)\n\n[BOOK HEIGHTS](https://app.squareup.com/appointments/book/bae52dd4-95fe-4d53-96c8-c8a5ef33e653/L98TGJ7XRW9KW/start)\n\n[BOOK WITH ADAM](https://the-inbound-barber.square.site/)\n\n![](https://tradesmenbarber.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/cancellationbutton-3.jpg)\n\n## TRADESMEN SERVICES\n\n### **HCT:  50**   Full service haircut with hot towel finish\n\n### **HCT / BRD TRM:  75**      **LONG HAIR TRIM:  65**  This service is for hair that is at the shoulders and would like to maintain length by removing a few inches.\n\n### **LONG HAIR TRIM+ BZZCT:  95**  This service adds a buzz cut below the long hair trim.\n\n### **KIDS CUT (ages 8-13):  40** This cut is for children between the ages of 8-13.  The cut is thirty mins long and will come with an optional rinse if time allows.\n\n### **SHAVE:  40**   Full face shave—hot towels w/ warm lather\n\n### **BZZCT:  35**   Single guard all around\n\n### **BRD TRM:  25**   Thorough consultation and beard maintenance\n\n### **BRD TRM & 1/2 SHV:  35**   Straight razor—hot towels w/ warm lather   **HEAD SHAVE:  35**  **FOLLOW UP TRM: 25**   After every full haircut a client has the option to book this service.The barber will take the sides down to the previous full cut.
